_comment: Zava telematics Eventstream item definition (plan Step 18). This is the 'eventstream.json' topology part for the Fabric Eventstream item created by fabric/scripts/75_create_eventhouse.py. It ingests the synthetic telematics feed produced by data/generate_telematics_stream.py into the Step-18 Eventhouse KQL 'Telematics' table. The __ZAVA_* placeholder tokens (and the all-zero GUIDs) are substituted at deploy time by 75_create_eventhouse.py from deploy_config + the ids of the freshly created workspace/Eventhouse/KQL database. NO secrets: the CustomEndpoint source's connection string is created once in the UI and is never committed (see docs/manual-steps.md, Step 18).

sources.name: TelematicsCustomApp
sources._comment: Custom App / custom-endpoint source. After the Eventstream is created, copy its event-hub-compatible connection string (UI: Eventstream -> source -> Keys) and point a small pusher / data/generate_telematics_stream.py replayer at it. The connection string is a runtime secret and is never stored in this repo.

destinations.name: TelematicsEventhouse
destinations._comment: Eventhouse destination -> KQL Telematics table. workspaceId/itemId are placeholder GUIDs that 75_create_eventhouse.py replaces with the real workspace id and the KQL database item id; databaseName/tableName tokens are replaced from realtime.kql_database_name / realtime.kql_table_name. Lands rows via the TelematicsMapping JSON ingestion mapping defined in eventhouse_setup.kql.
